title: Karnataka High Court rebukes lawyer for dictating, browbeating judge
description: The Karnataka High Court recently made adverse remarks against a lawyer for "dictating and browbeating" it with a view to getting a favourable order [Ganesh & Ors v. Govind Reddy & Ors].While dismissing a review petition argued by Advocate BM Arun, Justice Hanchate Sanjeevkumar said that the lawyer virtually "dictated the Court to write the order according to his convenience and his whims and fancies." "Sri.B.M.Arun, learned counsel argued the matter on review petition in the tone of vir
